steps.title: Read the trend
steps.content: The scatterplot trend decreases from left to right, so the line of best fit should have a negative slope. The trend also crosses the $y$-axis near $6$, so the $y$-intercept should be positive.

steps.title: Match slope and intercept
steps.content: The equation with negative slope and $y$-intercept $6$ is $$y=-x+6$$ The equation $y=-x-6$ has the right slope but the wrong intercept, and the other two choices have positive slope. The answer is A.
